description: Testing email-based registration functionality including form validation, database storage, email verification, and account activation process.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify user can register successfully when inputting all valid data into required fields and clicking "Sign up" button
expected_result:
Register successfully
- Displays success message

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify register info is saved to database correctly when registering account successfully
expected_result: Data is saved on DB successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify register info is saved to database correctly when many users register at the same time
expected_result: Data is saved on DB corresponding user

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify only one account is created successfully when user clicks on "Submit" button many time
expected_result:
- Only one record user is saved on DB
- System send only one email

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify that Email is sent to user email after registering successfully
expected_result: Email is sent to user email successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify email is sent with correct title and content when users register successfully
expected_result: Title and content email is correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify account is active successfully when user clicks on link in email
expected_result:
- Active account successfully
- User can login with account

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify link on email is invalid when over X hours
[base on spec]
expected_result: Display the corresponding error message

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify link on email is invalid when account was actived
expected_result: Display the corresponding error message

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify Account is not activated when user does not any action with received email
expected_result: Can not login with registerd account

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify Account is not activated when user's email is locked
expected_result: Can not login with registerd account

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify error message displays and user can not register account when inputting invalid email:
- Invalid format email
- Existing active email [base on spec]
- Deleted/Block/Inactive account
expected_result: Display the corresponding error message on each fields

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify error message displays and user can not register account when inputting a registered email but not actived yet
expected_result: Display the corresponding error message on email fields

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify error message displays and user can not register account when let other any required fields empty
expected_result: Display the corresponding error message on each fields

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify error message displays and user can not register account when turning off "Agree with terms & conditions"
expected_result: Display the corresponding error message

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify error message displays and user can not register account when inputting invalid data for other fields
expected_result: Display the corresponding error message

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify register information is not saved to database when happening any error in registation
expected_result: DB is not saved any information

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify email is note sent to user's email when happening any error in registation
expected_result: User can not receive any emails

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify pop-up "Terms & conditions" displays when clicking on link "terms & conditions"
expected_result: Display pop-up "Terms & conditions"

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify content of popup "Terms & conditions" displays correctly
expected_result: Content of "Terms & conditions" displays correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify login screen displays when clicking on link "Log-in"
expected_result: Display Login screen

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify navigate to corresponding other linked on Register screen
expected_result: Displays the corresponding screen

description: Testing SMS-based registration functionality including phone verification, verification code management, and form validation.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify Verification code is sent to phone when user inputting valid phone number and clicking on button Send Verification code
expected_result: Verification code is sent to phone

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify content of text message is correctly
expected_result: Content of text message is correct and contains Verification code

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify Verification code is expired after X hours
[base on spec]
expected_result: Error message displays when using expired verification code to register

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify error message displays when inputting invalid phone number
expected_result:
- Display the corresponding error message
- Verification code is not sent to any phone number
** Can request developer write log send Verification code to verify

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify error message displays when inputting existing active phone number
expected_result:
- Display the corresponding error message
- Verification code is not sent to phone number
** Can request developer write log send Verification code to verify

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify Verification code can be sent again after X seconds
[base on spec]
expected_result: Another verification code is sent to phone

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify user can register successfully when inputting all valid data into required fields and clicking "Sign up" button
- correct verification code
expected_result:
Register successfully
- Displays success message
- Can login with registerd account

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify register info is saved to database correctly when registering account successfully
expected_result: Data is saved on DB successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify error message displays and user can not register account when let any required field empty
expected_result: Display the corresponding error message on each fields

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify error message displays and user can not register account when iputting expired verification code
expected_result: Display the corresponding error message

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify error message displays and user can not register account when not iputting lastest verification code
expected_result: Display the corresponding error message

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify error message displays and user can not register account when iputting verification code of other phone number
expected_result: Display the corresponding error message

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify error message displays and user can not register account when turning off "Agree with terms & conditions"
expected_result: Display the corresponding error message

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify error message displays and user can not register account when inputting other invalid data for any fields
expected_result: Display the corresponding error message

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify register information is not saved to database when happening any error in registation
expected_result: DB is not saved any information

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify pop-up "Terms & conditions" displays when clicking on link "terms & conditions"
expected_result: Display pop-up "Terms & conditions"

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify content of popup "Terms & conditions" displays correctly
expected_result: Content of "Terms & conditions" displays correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify login screen displays when clicking on link "Log-in"
expected_result: Display Login screen

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify navigate to corresponding other linked on Register screen
expected_result: Displays the corresponding screen
